summary: All requested features verified. Landing page pricing shows correct features (Rent payment tracking in Standard, AI-Powered Insights Dashboard in Pro). Tenant Portal payments tab works correctly without Pay Now button, shows 'Contact your property manager' message. Maintenance page shows contractor dropdown when editing requests. Backend APIs all pass. Fixed a SelectItem empty value bug in Maintenance.js that was causing runtime errors.

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing 'Uncaught runtime errors' when opening maintenance request edit dialog
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed SelectItem value from empty string '' to 'unassigned' and updated onValueChange handler to convert 'unassigned' back to null

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/billing/plans returns 200
Backend: Billing plans has three tiers (free, standard, pro)
Backend: Standard tier has 'Rent payment tracking' feature
Backend: Pro tier has 'AI-Powered Insights Dashboard' feature
Backend: Standard tier pricing correct ($49/mo, $39/mo annual)
Backend: Pro tier pricing correct ($149/mo, $119/mo annual)
Backend: GET /api/maintenance-requests returns 200 with requests list
Backend: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/contractors returns 200
Backend: POST /api/maintenance-requests/{id}/assign-contractor endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/tenant-portal/rent-payments requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Landing page pricing section shows 'Rent payment tracking' in Standard tier
Frontend: Landing page pricing section shows 'AI-Powered Insights Dashboard' in Pro tier
Frontend: Free/Standard/Pro tier cards visible with correct indicators
Frontend: Tenant Portal 'Pay Rent' tab shows 'Rent Payments' title
Frontend: Tenant Portal payments shows 'View your payment history and upcoming rent dues' subtitle
Frontend: Tenant Portal payments shows 'Contact your property manager' message
Frontend: Tenant Portal payments does NOT show 'Pay Now' button (correct - online payments removed)
Frontend: Tenant Portal payments shows 'Payment Information' section
Frontend: Manager login works (test@test.com/test123)
Frontend: Maintenance page loads with data-testid='maintenance-page'
Frontend: Maintenance request edit dialog opens without errors (after fix)
Frontend: 'Assign to Contractor' section visible in maintenance edit dialog
Frontend: Contractor 'John Plumber' shows as Assigned in test maintenance request

mocked_apis.tenant_screening: Uses simulated API - not a real screening provider

context_for_next_testing_agent: All pricing features verified. Tenant Portal payments tab correctly shows payment history without online payment option (removed per requirements). Maintenance page contractor assignment verified working with test contractor 'John Plumber'. Fixed a SelectItem empty value bug in Maintenance.js. Online rent collection via Stripe was intentionally removed - landlords now collect payments externally and mark as paid manually.
